text:
EXPLANATION: The cited reference refers to the Llama 3.1 8B model released by Meta and hosted on Hugging Face. The reference is valid as it points to the official model repository, and the minor discrepancy between the cited organization and the hosting platform's metadata does not constitute a hallucination.

LINK: https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B
